entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00069) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00069 TO IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS AS FOLLOWS:
(1) TO REDISTRIBUTE 32,132 UNITS OF THE TOTAL 40,000 FROM IDIQ SUB-CLIN 4003AA COMPUTER BASED TESTING (TSO) TO NEW IDIQ SUB-CLIN 4003AA-1 COMPUTER BASED TESTING (TSO). THE UNIT PRICE REMAINS UNCHANGED.
(2) TO EXERCISE IDIQ SUB-CLIN 4003AA COMPUTER BASED TESTING (TSO) FOR THE QUANTITY OF 7,864 UNITS. THE UNIT PRICE REMAINS UNCHANGED.
(3) TO REDISTRIBUTE 771.40 UNITS OF THE TOTAL 2,571.40 FROM IDIQ SUB-CLIN 4004CB POST AIRPORT ASSESSMENT TO NEW IDIQ SUB-CLIN 4004CB-1 POST AIRPORT ASSESSMENT. THE UNIT PRICE REMAINS UNCHANGED.
(4) TO EXERCISE IDIQ SUB-CLIN 4004CB POST AIRPORT ASSESSMENT FOR THE QUANTITY OF 1,800 UNITS. THE UNIT PRICE REMAINS UNCHANGED.
(5) TO REDISTRIBUTE 2,887 UNITS OF THE TOTAL 5,000 FROM IDIQ SUB-CLIN 4006AB MEDICAL PROCESSING TO NEW IDIQ SUB-CLIN 4006AB-1 MEDICAL PROCESSING. THE UNIT PRICE REMAINS UNCHANGED.
(6) TO EXERCISE IDIQ SUB-CLIN 4006AB MEDICAL PROCESSING FOR THE QUANTITY OF 2,113. THE UNIT PRICE REMAINS UNCHANGED.
(7) TO UPDATE LOCKHEED MARTIN'S KEY PERSONNEL UNDER THE HRACCESS IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IN ACCORDANCE CLAUSE H.29 TO:
PROGRAM MANAGER: JIM STEVENS DEPUTY PROGRAM MANAGER: KATHLEEN OTT CHIEF MISSION OFFICER: RUPAL PATEL IT MANAGER: KEITH USHER HELP DESK MANAGER: JESSICA MARTINEZ IT SECURITY OFFICER: DENISE FLORY CHIEF ENGINEER: JOHN WEGL RECRUITMENT&HIRING MANAGER: JACK PENKOSKE PERSONNEL, PAYROLL&BENEFITS MANAGER: ERIKA MARSHALL
(8) TO INCORPORATE THE STATEMENT "OY 2 PERFORMANCE EVALUATION PLAN (PEP) METRICS UNDER HSTS01-11-J-HRM048 WILL APPLY TO OY 3 UNDER HSTS01-12-J-HRM040" INTO THE HRACCESS IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010.
(9) TO INCORPORATE THE ATTACHED DOCUMENT ENTITLED "LOCKHEED MARTIN INTERNAL CONTROLS STATEMENT OF ASSURANCE VERSION 1.0" INTO THE HRACCESS IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010. THE ATTACHED DOCUMENT WILL BE MANAGED BY LOCKHEED MARTIN'S DOCUMENT CONTROL (DM) AND WILL BE REVIEWED AND UPDATED ANNUALLY IF PROCESSES HAVE CHANGED. HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 SHALL BE MODIFIED ACCORDINGLY WHEN NEW VERSIONS OF THE ATTACHMENT DOCUMENT ARE FINALIZED.
THERE IS NO EFFECT ON THE CEILING OF HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 AS A RESULT OF THIS ACTION. MASTER SCHEDULE B IS HEREBY UPDATED ACCORDINGLY.
MODIFICATION P00014 WILL BE MADE TO TASK ORDER HSTS01-12-J-HRM040 TO FUND SUB-CLINS 4003AA, 4004CB, AND 4006AB WITH $1,454,973 THRU OY 3 YEAR END.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00070) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00070 TO IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS AS FOLLOWS:
(1) TO EXERCISE IDIQ SUB-CLIN 4015AB SF-52&BENEFITS PROCESSING FOR THE QUANTITY OF 25,000 UNITS.
(2) TO EXERCISE IDIQ SUB-CLIN 4015AC SF-52&BENEFITS PROCESSING (PASS) FOR THE QUANTITY OF 92,000 UNITS.
THERE IS NO EFFECT ON THE CEILING OF HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 AS A RESULT OF THIS ACTION. MASTER SCHEDULE B IS HEREBY UPDATED ACCORDINGLY.
MODIFICATION P00015 WILL BE MADE TO TASK ORDER HSTS01-12-J-HRM040 TO FUND SUB-CLINS 4015AB AND 4015AC WITH $3,418,740 THRU OY 3 YEAR END.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00071) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00071 TO IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO CREATE SUB-CLIN 4003AE "COMPUTER BASED TESTING (TSO) - MOBILE" TO ADD 15 ADDITIONAL MOBILE COMPUTER BASED TESTS (CBT) FOR THE REMAINDER OF OPTION YEAR 3. SCHEDULE B "SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS" IS UPDATED ACCORDINGLY.
THERE IS NO AFFECT ON THE CEILING OF HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 AS A RESULT OF THIS ACTION.
MODIFICATION P00016 WILL BE MADE TO TASK ORDER HSTS01-12-J-HRM040 TO FULLY FUND SUB-CLIN 4003AE IN THE AMOUNT OF $52,516.20 FOR THE PERIOD OF NOVEMBER 21, 2012 THROUGH JANUARY 1, 2013.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS ARE IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT AND REMAIN UNCHANGED.

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00072) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00072 TO IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO EXERCISE THE REQUIRED QUANTITIES OF OPTIONAL CLINS 4003AA-1 "COMPUTER BASED TESTING (TSO)," 4006AB-1 "MEDICAL PROCESSING," AND 4015AD "SF-52 AND BENEFITS PROCESSING," AS WELL AS CREATE CLIN 4005AD "BACKGROUND CHECK," IN ORDER TO CONTINUE PERFORMANCE ON THESE CLINS THROUGH THE END OF OPTION PERIOD 3. THIS MODIFICATION WILL ALSO ADD PREVIOUSLY EXERCISED CLIN 4005AC "BACKGROUND CHECK" TO SCHEDULE B "SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS" AS WELL AS UPDATE THE ITEM DESCRIPTION FOR CLIN 4005AC "CLIN 4005AB: BACKGROUND CHECK" IN THE IDIQ AWARD DOCUMENT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00073) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00073 TO IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS AS FOLLOWS:
(1) TO EXTEND THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE (POP) OF CLIN 4024 DATA WAREHOUSE BY TWO MONTHS. THE POP FOR CLIN 4024 IS REVISED FROM 6/1/2012 - 1/1/2013 TO 6/1/2012 - 2/28/2013. PER CLAUSE I.6 OPTION TO EXTEND SERVICES 3.2.4-34 (FEB 2003), THE CONTRACTOR SHALL CONTINUE PROVIDING INTEGRATED DATA WAREHOUSE (IDW) SERVICES IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 12 OF THE STATEMENT OF WORK (SOW).
(2) TO INCREASE THE CEILING OF CLIN 4024 DATA WAREHOUSE BY $1,864,572.67 FROM $5,189,119.00 TO $7,053,69.67.
(3) TO CREATE SUB-CLIN 4024A DATA WAREHOUSE OY 3 EXTENSION FOR ADMINISTRATIVE PURPOSES. THIS NEWLY CREATED SUB-CLIN WILL SERVE TO EXTEND THE POP AT A COST OF $1,864,572.67 FOR SERVICES PROVIDED UNDER CLIN 4024 DATA WAREHOUSE.
MASTER SCHEDULE B "SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS" IS UPDATED ACCORDINGLY.
MODIFICATION P00018 WILL BE MADE TO TASK ORDER HSTS01-12-J-HRM040 TO EXERCISE AND FULLY FUND SUB-CLIN 4024A IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,864,572.67 FOR THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE OF 1/2/2013 - 2/28/2013.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITINS ARE IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT AND REMAIN UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00074) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00074 TO IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO EXERCISE OPTION PERIOD 4; RESTRUCTURE SCHEDULE B "SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICES/COSTS" FOR OPTION PERIOD 4 FOR THE EASE OF ADMINISTRATION DUE TO THE FY13 CONTINUING APPROPRIATIONS RESOLUTION (CR); INCORPORATE THE REVISED PEP METRICS AND BUSINESS RULES; UPDATE INFORMATION SECURITY AND PRIVACY INFORMATION IN SECTIONS C AND H; CREATE CLIN 5026 "T-ORG MANUAL;" REDUCE THE VALUE OF CLIN 5022 "TRAVEL," ADD CONTRACT FUNDING LANGUAGE TO SECTION H; REDUCE CLIN 5004 "AIRPORT ASSESSMENT, POST AIRPORT ASSESSMENT" TO A ZERO BALANCE; AS WELL AS REMOVE CLIN 5027 "NURSE CASE MANAGEMENT SERVICES." THE CONTRACT IS HEREBY MODIFIED ACCORDINGLY:
1) REMOVE CLIN 5027 "NURSE CASE MANAGEMENT SERVICES" AS THIS IS NO LONGER AN HRACCESS REQUIREMENT;
2) REDUCE CLIN 5004 "AIRPORT ASSESSMENT, POST AIRPORT ASSESSMENT" TO A ZERO BALANCE PER MODIFICATION P00042 WHICH SPLIT THE CLIN INTO TWO SEPARATE LINE ITEMS: 5004AA "ON-SITE: AIRPORT ASSESSMENT" AND 5004AB "POST AIRPORT ASSESSMENT."
3) CLIN 5002 "RECRUITMENT ACTIVITIES" IS HEREBY INCREMENTALLY FUNDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $6,540,000 WITH THE COST AND AWARD FEE SPLIT INTO TWO SEPARATE CLINS FOR ADMINISTRATIVE EASE. OF THAT, $6,000,000 IS EXERCISED AGAINST CLIN 5002 "RECRUITMENT ACTIVITIES (COST ONLY)," AND $540,000 IS EXERCISED IN CLIN 5002-1 "RECRUITMENT ACTIVITIES (AWARD FEE ONLY)," WHICH REPRESENTS THE 9% AWARD FEE. THIS FUNDING AMOUNT IS BASED ON ANTICIPATED RECRUITMENT ACTIVITIES DURING THE 8 MONTH PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE.
4) CLIN 5022 "TRAVEL" IS HEREBY DECREASED FROM $3,523,306 BY $1,723,306 TO $1,800,000 IN ACCORDANCE WITH DHS TRAVEL REGULATIONS.
5) CLIN 5026 IS HEREBY CREATED TO INCORPORATE THE "T-ORG MANUAL" REQUIREMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $261,972.31. THE UPDATED STATEMENT OF WORK IS HEREBY INCORPORATED, SEE ATTACHMENT 1.
6) SCHEDULE B "B.1 SCHEDULE OF SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICES/COSTS" IS HEREBY REVISED TO REFLECT THE FUNDING AVAILABLE FOR EIGHT (8) MONTHS OF PERFORMANCE, UNLESS OTHERWISE NOTED HEREIN, DURING OPTION PERIOD 4 (01/02/2013 - 09/01/2013) DUE TO THE CR. FOR ADMINISTRATIVE EASE, AN OPTIONAL SUB-CLIN IS CREATED FOR ALL EXERCISED OPTION PERIOD 4 CLINS TO REFLECT THE BALANCE REMAINING ON EACH CLIN THROUGH THE REMAINDER OF OPTION PERIOD 4 (09/02/2013 - 01/01/2014). THE TOTAL CUMULATIVE VALUE OF EACH CLIN REMAINS UNCHANGED.
7) SECTION B "SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS" IN SUPPORT OF IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010, OPTION PERIOD 4 IS HEREBY DELETED IN ITS ENTIRETY AND REPLACED WITH THE ATTACHED SECTION B "SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS (ATTACHMENT 2)" WHICH CONTAINS SEVERAL ADMINISTRATIVE CHANGES FOR EASE OF ADMINISTRATION. THIS STRUCTURE SHALL GOVERN FOR FUTURE MODIFICATIONS IN THE EVENT A BUDGET IS NOT APPROVED PRIOR TO THE EXPIRATION OF THE CURRENT CR, OR IF A FULL CR IS NOT PASSED.
(8) THE REVISED PERFORMANCE EVALUATION PLAN (PEP) METRICS - OBJECTIVE EVALUATION SCORING SHEET (ATTACHMENT 3) AND BUSINESS RULES (ATTACHMENTS 4-7) ARE HEREBY INCORPORATED FOR OPTION PERIOD 4 UNDER TSA'S SOLE AND UNILATERAL AUTHORITY PURSUANT TO IDIQ ATTACHMENT J.4: IHOP PERFORMANCE EVALUATION PLAN, NEW PERFORMANCE METRICS. THE CONTRACTOR WAS NOTIFIED OF THE REVISED PERFORMANCE METRICS ON OCTOBER 4, 2012.
(9) SECTION C, STATEMENT OF WORK, SECTIONS 7.9 "RECORDS MANAGEMENT" AND 10 "SYSTEMS INTEGRATION," (SEE ATTACHMENT 8) AND SECTION H "SPECIAL CONTRACT REQUIREMENTS," SECTIONS H.3 "INFORMATION SECURITY AND PRIVACY" AND H.11 "SENSITIVE INFORMATION REQUIREMENTS" (SEE ATTACHMENT 9) ARE HEREBY UPDATED TO REPLACE REFERENCES MADE TO SUPERSEDED TSA MANAGEMENT DIRECTIVES 3700.2 AND 3700.3 WITH 3700.4 "HANDLING SENSITIVE PERSONALLY IDENTIFIABLE INFORMATION." SECTION H.8 "SENSITIVE INFORMATION" IS HEREBY UPDATED TO CORRECT THE REFERENCE MADE TO THE DEFINITION OF SENSITIVE INFORMATION BEING IN ITEM H.5 TO H.6.
(10) THE FOLLOWING LANGUAGE IS HEREBY INCORPORATED INTO SECTION H (SEE ATTACHMENT 9):

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00075) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00075 TO HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO REPLACE ATTACHMENT 5 "BUSINESS RULES APPLIED TO PAYROLL AND BENEFITS TRANSACTIONS - PROCESSED THROUGH THE SIEBEL HELP DESK SYSTEM" WHICH WAS ERRONEOUSLY AWARDED UNDER P00074 WITH THE ATTACHED VERSION. THIS VERSION REMOVES THE OPTIONAL AND VERA RETIREMENT APPLICATIONS BUSINESS RULES. ALL PEP METRICS AND BUSINESS RULES BECAME EFFECTIVE ON JANUARY 2, 2013.
ALL OTHER BUSINESS RULES, AS WELL AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS, ARE IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT AND REMAIN UNCHANGED UNLESS OTHERWISE CHANGED BY A CONTRACTING OFFICER.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00076) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00076 TO IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS AS FOLLOWS:
14(A) TO EXTEND THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE (POP) OF CLIN 4024 DATA WAREHOUSE BY TWO MONTHS. THE POP FOR CLIN 4024 IS REVISED FROM 6/1/2012 - 2/28/2013 TO 6/1/2012 - 4/30/2013. PER CLAUSE I.6 OPTION TO EXTEND SERVICES 3.2.4-34 (FEB 2003), THE CONTRACTOR SHALL CONTINUE PROVIDING INTEGRATED DATA WAREHOUSE (IDW) SERVICES IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 12 OF THE STATEMENT OF WORK (SOW).
14(B) TO INCREASE THE CEILING OF CLIN 4024 DATA WAREHOUSE BY $2,156,245.98 FROM $7,053,691.67 TO $9,209,937.65.
14(C) TO CREATE SUB-CLIN 4024B DATA WAREHOUSE OY 3 EXTENSION FOR ADMINISTRATIVE PURPOSES. THIS NEWLY CREATED SUB-CLIN WILL SERVE TO EXTEND THE POP AT A COST OF $2,156,245.98 FOR SERVICES PROVIDED UNDER CLIN 4024 DATA WAREHOUSE.
14(D) SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS OF THE SUBJECT CONTRACT SHALL BE REVISED ACCORDINGLY.
14(E) MODIFICATION P00020 WILL BE MADE TO TASK ORDER HSTS01-12-J-HRM040 TO EXERCISE AND FULLY FUND SUB-CLIN 4024B IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,156,245.98 FOR THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE OF 3/1/2013 - 4/30/2013.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SUBJECT CONTRACT REMAIN UNCHANGED AND IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT UNLESS OTHERWISE CHANGED BY THE HRACCESS CONTRACTING OFFICER.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00077) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00077 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO REVERT BACK TO THE PERFORMANCE EVALUATION PLAN (PEP) METRICS UTILIZED IN OPTION PERIODS 2 AND 3; EXERCISE CLIN 5004AA-1 "ON-SITE AIRPORT ASSESSMENT;" INCORPORATE TSA MANAGEMENT DIRECTIVE (MD) 3500.2 "USE OF FORCE AND FIREARMS," AS WELL AS REVISE ATTACHMENT J.5 "WAGE DETERMINATIONS" TO UPDATE THE WAGE DETERMINATIONS APPLICABLE TO THIS CONTRACT, TO INCLUDE THE ADDITION OF WAGE DETERMINATIONS FOR BREVARD COUNTY, FLORIDA.
AS A RESULT OF THIS MODIFICATION, THE FOLLOWING CHANGES HEREBY TAKE PLACE:
(A)TSA IS HEREBY REVERTING BACK TO THE PEP METRICS UTILIZED IN OPTION PERIODS 2 AND 3 IN PLACE OF THE REVISED PEP METRICS AND BUSINESS RULES IMPLEMENTED IN MODIFICATION P00074 FOR OPTION PERIOD 4 (JANUARY 2, 2013 THROUGH JANUARY 1, 2014). THE CONTRACTOR WAS NOTIFIED OF THE CHANGE IN PERFORMANCE METRICS ON MARCH 14, 2013 AND REQUESTED TO HALT ANY HIRING OF ADDITIONAL STAFF OR INCURRING ANY ADDITIONAL EXPENSES RELATED PEP METRICS ON MARCH 11, 2013.
(B) ATTACHMENT J.4 "IHOP PERFORMANCE EVALUATION PLAN" APPENDIX B - OBJECTIVE PERFORMANCE EVALUATION SCORING SHEET AND APPENDIX F - CPAF CLIN 5002 EVALUATION SCORING SHEET FOR OPTION PERIOD 4 ARE HEREBY REVISED AS ATTACHED (ATTACHMENT 1).
(C) CLIN 5004AA-1 "ON-SITE AIRPORT ASSESSMENT" IS HEREBY EXERCISED DUE TO AIRPORTS HIRING SIGNIFICANTLY MORE THAN HISTORICAL ESTIMATES PROJECTED AND UNPLANNED REQUESTS FOR ADDITIONAL SUPPORT DUE TO THE OPM CONTRACT ENDING IN SEPTEMBER 2012. THIS CLIN WILL BE FUNDED ON THE OPTION PERIOD 4 TASK ORDER HSTS01-13-J-HRM022 PER MODIFICATION P00001.
(D) SECTION H.1 "APPLICABLE DOCUMENTS" IS HEREBY MODIFIED TO INCLUDE TSA MANAGEMENT DIRECTIVE 3500.2 "USE OF FORCE AND FIREARMS." (ATTACHMENT 2).
(E) IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION I.20 "SERVICE CONTRACT ACT OF 1965" OF THE SUBJECT IDIQ, ATTACHMENT J.5 WAGE DETERMINATIONS IS HEREBY REPLACED WITH UPDATED COPIES OF THE WAGE DETERMINATIONS MADE AVAILABLE BY THE WAGE AND HOUR DIVISION, EMPLOYMENT STANDARDS ADMINISTRATION U.S. DEPARTMENT OF LABOR, FOR THE APPLICABLE PLACES OR AREAS OF PERFORMANCE FOR THIS CONTRACT. ADDITIONALLY, AS OF OPTION PERIOD 4, THE BREVARD COUNTY, FLORIDA WAGE DETERMINATION IS HEREBY ADDED AS APPLICABLE TO THIS CONTRACT.
(F) ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SUBJECT CONTRACT ARE IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT AND REMAIN UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00078) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: UNIQUE ENTITY ID OR LEGAL BUSINESS NAME CHANGE - NON-NOVATION

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00078 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO EXERCISE CLINS 5004BA "ON-SITE: AIRPORT ASSESSMENT" AND 5004AB-1 "POST AIRPORT ASSESSMENT," UPDATE LOCKHEED MARTIN'S DUNS NUMBER ASSOCIATED WITH THIS IDIQ, AS WELL AS UPDATE SECTION H.4.(B) "PERSONNEL SECURITY" TO UPDATE THE REQUIREMENT FOR BACKGROUND SCREENING CHECKS FOR ALL INDIVIDUALS GRANTED ACCESS TO SENSITIVE INFORMATION TO BE REFRESHED EVERY TEN YEARS RATHER THAN FIVE, UNLESS THE INDIVIDUAL HOLDS A TOP SECRET LEVEL CLEARANCE, WHICH REQUIRES A REFRESH EVERY FIVE YEARS.
AS A RESULT OF THIS MODIFICATION, THE FOLLOWING CHANGES HEREBY TAKE PLACE:
A.) CLINS 5004BA "ON-SITE: AIRPORT ASSESSMENT" AND 5004AB-1 "POST AIRPORT ASSESSMENT" ARE HEREBY EXERCISED. THESE CLINS WILL BE FUNDED ON THE OPTION PERIOD 4 TASK ORDER HSTS01-13-J-HRM022 PER MODIFICATION P00002.
B.) THE DUNS NUMBER ASSOCIATED WITH THIS IDIQ IS HEREBY UPDATED FROM 836196972 TO 809270221.
C.) ONLY (B) OF SECTION H.4 "PERSONNEL SECURITY" IS HEREBY UPDATED AS FOLLOWS:
FROM: BACKGROUND SCREENING CHECKS FOR ALL INDIVIDUALS GRANTED ACCESS TO SENSITIVE INFORMATION SHALL BE REFRESHED EVERY FIVE YEARS. THE CONTRACTOR SHALL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR MONITORING THE SERVICE LENGTH OF ALL CONTRACTOR EMPLOYEES WORKING UNDER THIS CONTRACT, AND SHALL SUBMIT THE REQUIRED INFORMATION FOR REFRESHED BACKGROUND SCREENING CHECKS IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE FIVE-YEAR PERIOD.
TO: BACKGROUND SCREENING CHECKS FOR ALL INDIVIDUALS GRANTED ACCESS TO SENSITIVE INFORMATION SHALL BE REFRESHED EVERY TEN YEARS, UNLESS THE INDIVIDUAL HOLDS A TOP SECRET LEVEL CLEARANCE, WHICH REQUIRES A REFRESH EVERY FIVE YEARS. THE CONTRACTOR SHALL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR MONITORING THE SERVICE LENGTH OF ALL CONTRACTOR EMPLOYEES WORKING UNDER THIS CONTRACT, AND SHALL SUBMIT THE REQUIRED INFORMATION FOR REFRESHED BACKGROUND SCREENING CHECKS IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE TEN-YEAR (FIVE-YEAR FOR TOP SECRET LEVEL CLEARANCES) PERIOD.
D.) ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SUBJECT CONTRACT ARE IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT AND REMAIN UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
